scenarios.name: Audit pnpm + Turborepo monorepo for version mismatches
scenarios.rationale: Treatment first detects monorepo type from pnpm-workspace.yaml/turbo.json, produces a per-package comparison table, and recommends workspace:* for internal deps; baseline lists versions ad hoc without the structured detection workflow.

scenarios.name: Add shared date-fns and align versions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment centralizes date-fns through packages/utils, removes direct deps from apps, and flags v2 to v3 breaking changes (named exports, dd/yy tokens), while baseline only bumps versions without consolidation or migration notes.
